explanation: The phrase 'exceeding sensor limits' maps to atomic proposition limits,  'shall latch an autopilot pullup' means the system enters pullup state which is represented by the atomic proposition pullup. The formula for 'when the pilot is not in control (not standby)' is !standby, and 'the system is supported without failures (not apfail)' is supported & !apfail. The phrase 'when the pilot is not in control' can be translated to !standby, and 'the system is supported without failures' can be translated to supported & !apfail. The formula becomes limits & !standby & supported & !apfail -> X pullup.
